description: Implement prompt engineering layer with refined patterns for effective tool usage, task execution, and context management in hex-agent

phases.name: Domain Types for Context
phases.description: Create core domain types for prompt templates and context

tasks.name: Create PromptTemplate enum
tasks.description: Define PromptTemplate enum with variants for SystemPrompt, ToolPrompt, ServicePrompt. Include template variables support.

tasks.name: Create ContextBuilder struct
tasks.description: Implement ContextBuilder for composing prompts per agent role with variable substitution.

tasks.name: Define agent role types
tasks.description: Add AgentRole enum (Coder, Planner, Reviewer, Integrator) and role-specific context.

phases.name: PromptPort Interface
phases.description: Define the port interface for prompt building

tasks.name: Define PromptPort trait
tasks.description: Create PromptPort with methods: build_system_prompt, build_tool_prompt, build_service_prompt

tasks.name: Define ContextError type
tasks.description: Create ContextError for prompt building failures (template not found, variable missing, etc.)

phases.name: ContextAdapter Implementation
phases.description: Implement the context adapter loading templates from assets

tasks.name: Implement ContextAdapter
tasks.description: Implement ContextAdapter that loads prompt templates from hex-cli/assets/context-templates/

tasks.name: Add template caching
tasks.description: Implement LRU cache for composed prompts to avoid recomputation

tasks.name: Add template variable substitution
tasks.description: Implement variable substitution for {{project_name}}, {{task_description}}, {{agent_role}}, etc.

phases.name: Base Prompt Templates
phases.description: Create base prompt templates in hex-cli/assets

tasks.name: Create system prompt templates
tasks.description: Create system prompt templates: SIMPLE_INTRO, SIMPLE_SYSTEM, DOING_TASKS, EXECUTING_ACTIONS, USING_YOUR_TOOLS, TONE_AND_STYLE, OUTPUT_EFFICIENCY

tasks.name: Create tool prompt templates
tasks.description: Create tool-specific prompts for: Bash, Agent, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, WebSearch, WebFetch, TodoWrite, Skill

tasks.name: Create service prompt templates
tasks.description: Create service prompts for: Session Memory, Memory Extraction, HexFlo memory (global/swarm/agent)

phases.name: Role-Specific Templates
phases.description: Create role-specific prompt variants for hex agents

tasks.name: Create hex-coder templates
tasks.description: Create role-specific system and tool prompts for hex-coder (TDD workflow, boundary rules, test focus)

tasks.name: Create hex-planner templates
tasks.description: Create role-specific prompts for hex-planner (workplan decomposition, task assignment)

tasks.name: Create hex-reviewer templates
tasks.description: Create role-specific prompts for hex-reviewer (code quality gates, boundary enforcement)

phases.name: HexFlo Integration
phases.description: Wire context engineering into HexFlo task execution

tasks.name: Add prompt injection to task execution
tasks.description: Modify hex-nexus orchestration to inject role-specific prompts into agent prompts

tasks.name: Add role assignment to agent registration
tasks.description: Update agent registration to include role (coder/planner/reviewer) and load appropriate templates

tasks.name: Add tool prompt injection
tasks.description: Inject tool-specific prompts before tool execution in ToolExecutorAdapter

phases.name: Template Hot-Reload
phases.description: Add capability to reload templates without restart

tasks.name: Add template reload endpoint
tasks.description: Add /api/context/reload endpoint to trigger template cache invalidation

tasks.name: Add file watcher for templates
tasks.description: Watch hex-cli/assets/context-templates/ for changes and auto-reload

tasks.name: Test prompt composition
tasks.description: Write tests for ContextBuilder composing prompts with variables

tasks.name: Test template loading
tasks.description: Write tests for ContextAdapter loading templates from assets

tasks.name: Test role-specific prompts
tasks.description: Write tests verifying different roles get appropriate prompts

phases.name: Live Context Enrichment
phases.description: Inject live hex project state into prompts before agent dispatch — architecture score, ADRs, HexFlo memory, AST summaries, git diff, and specs

tasks.name: Extend ContextVariables with live fields
tasks.description: Add fields to ContextVariables: architecture_score (Option<u8>), arch_violations (Option<Vec<String>>), relevant_adrs (Option<Vec<String>>), ast_summary (Option<String>), recent_changes (Option<String>), hexflo_memory (Option<String>), spec_content (Option<String>). Update get() to expose them.

tasks.name: Define ILiveContextPort trait
tasks.description: Create ILiveContextPort in hex-agent/src/ports/mod.rs with method enrich(vars: &mut ContextVariables, task: &str, files: &[String]) -> Result<()>. This is the boundary the adapter implements.

tasks.name: Implement LiveContextAdapter
tasks.description: Implement ILiveContextPort in hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/live_context.rs. Calls hex-nexus REST endpoints in parallel: GET /api/analyze (arch score + violations), GET /api/hexflo/memory/search?q=<task> (prior decisions), GET /api/adrs/search?q=<task> (relevant ADRs), GET /api/summarize (AST summary of target files), GET /api/git/diff (recent changes). Merge results into ContextVariables fields.

tasks.name: Update prompt templates to use live variables
tasks.description: Add {{architecture_score}}, {{arch_violations}}, {{relevant_adrs}}, {{ast_summary}}, {{recent_changes}}, {{hexflo_memory}}, {{spec_content}} placeholders to agent-coder, agent-reviewer, and agent-planner templates. Each variable should degrade gracefully when None (omit the section).

tasks.name: Wire LiveContextAdapter into task dispatch
tasks.description: In hex-nexus orchestration (task execution path), before building the agent prompt, call LiveContextAdapter.enrich() with the task description and target files from the workplan step. Requires LiveContextAdapter to be wired via composition root.

tasks.name: Add enrichment tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for LiveContextAdapter using a mock hex-nexus (wiremock or axum test server). Verify each endpoint is called, fields are populated, and missing endpoints degrade gracefully (None, not error).
